name: Charlotte Doyle
description:
This is an RPG of the book "The true confessions of Charlotte Doyle"

I tried my best to put the correct information in so it may take a while if need to update

This is limitless because in the book some people die, so please don't be weird or creepy, Charlotte is only 13 in this! You can go for any of the other characters I don't mind but don't be creepy!

And please be nice to Zachariah, he's a kind soul
creator: Joy Smiles
